data.title: AV Introduces MAYHEM 10: Multi-Role Launched Effects System at AAAA 2026
data.description: Aerospace company AeroVironment, Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAV) recently introduced MAYHEM 10, a revolutionary multi-role launched effects system designed for use on air, ground, and maritime platforms. This autonomous system offers operational flexibility with a modular payload that allows for interchangeable lethal and non-lethal effects, such as intelligence surveillance and reconnaissance (ISR). The debut of MAYHEM 10 signifies a major advancement in military technology and strategic capabilities.

data.title: Artsy and Artnet, Leaders of the Art World Online, Join Forces to Transform the Future of the Industry
data.description: Artsy and Artnet, two leading online platforms for art, are set to maintain their separate identities and websites. By leveraging their expertise in market insights, artistic discovery, e-commerce, and journalism, they aim to establish a revolutionary online framework for the art industry. This development was announced on April 15, 2026, in New York.

data.title: Cowboy Clean Fuels Carbon Credits Are Verified, Registered, and Available for Purchase
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Denver, Cowboy Clean Fuels (CCF) revealed that their carbon credits have been independently verified and are now listed on the registry. The climate-tech company provides permanent carbon removal and carbon-neutral renewable natural gas (RNG) solutions. These credits are now ready for immediate use.

data.title: Alibaba's Amap Set to Unveil First Embodied Robot, Homegrown Model Tops Global Rankings
data.description: In San Francisco on April 15, 2026, Alibaba Group's mapping division, Amap, announced its upcoming launch of a quadruped robot set to debut at the 2026 Beijing E-Town Half Marathon and Humanoid Robot Half Marathon. This innovative product marks Amap's first foray into embodied robotics, reflecting the company's venture into new technological ventures.

data.title: Lunai Bioworks (NASDAQ: LNAI) and Geneial Sign LOI to Build Rare Disease Patient Cohorts for Pharma Partnerships
data.description: A partnership has been formed to convert data provided by patients into cohorts ready for clinical trials, aimed at aiding drug development, forming commercial partnerships, and generating revenue. The collaboration is currently focusing on merging datasets for rare diseases and progressing partnership opportunities with pharmaceutical companies.

data.title: WACKER to Highlight Silicone Technologies for Transmission and Distribution at IEEE PES T&D 2026
data.description: At the IEEE PES T&D 2026 event, WACKER plans to exhibit silicone technologies tailored for transmission and distribution applications. They aim to address key grid challenges such as aging infrastructure, modernization needs, and reliability issues. The company highlights the importance of innovative materials in tackling these issues. Their showcase will feature solutions specifically designed to enhance grid efficiency and performance. WACKER's focus is on presenting their commitment to supporting the advancement of transmission and distribution processes through advanced silicone products.

data.title: Month-end portfolio data now available for Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Federated Hermes, Inc., a prominent active investing company, revealed the latest monthly fund composition and performance figures for the Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: FMN) as at March 30, 2026. The data can now be accessed for review.

data.title: Can A Generational Wealth Shift Unlock $2.2 Trillion In Crypto Demand?
data.description: The transfer of wealth from older generations to younger investors could greatly increase the demand for digital assets like Bitcoin (BTC) and the wider crypto market. Approximately $110 trillion in assets is currently held by Baby Boomers and the Silent Generation in the United States. This vast sum is projected to be inherited by Millennials and Gen Z, who exhibit a higher inclination towards crypto investments. data.title: IonQ Advances Quantum Networking Ambitions With DARPA Backing, Remote Entanglement Demo
data.description: IonQ Inc. (NYSE: IONQ) saw an increase in its shares during the premarket session on Wednesday after being chosen for DARPA's Heterogeneous Architectures for Quantum (HARQ) program. The program, announced on Tuesday, aims to create high-speed quantum interconnects connecting different types of quantum computers to establish networked quantum systems. This has generated interest in the stock as it represents a significant opportunity for IonQ to enhance the scalability of quantum technologies. IonQ, a quantum platform and merchant supplier, offers integrated quantum solutions in computing, networking, sensing, and security. The company's selection for the DARPA HARQ program has contributed to the positive market response.

data.title: GoodRx Now Offers Access to Wegovy® HD at $399 Per Month Self-Pay Price
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, GoodRx (Nasdaq: GDRX) shared news that the higher dosage of Wegovy® HD (semaglutide) injection at 7.2 mg is now accessible to qualifying self-pay individuals through GoodRx for $399 monthly. Prices vary based on quantity, with a two-month stock priced at $798 and a three-month supply at $1,197, providing customers with options and transparency on expenses. Wegovy HD presents a...

data.title: 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. to Release its Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results on Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: JERICHO, N.Y.--1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLWS) disclosed they will unveil their financial stats for the fiscal 2026 third quarter on May 7, 2026. The detailed press release will be available prior to market opening, followed by a conference call featuring senior management at 8 AM. 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, known for fostering meaningful connections and relationships through thoughtful gestures, is a leading provider in this sector. Their emphasis lies on encouraging customers to engage more and build stronger bonds.

data.title: Well People Celebrates Being Plant-Powered, Partnering with Arbor Day Foundation
data.description: In Oakland, California, Well People, a renowned clean beauty brand owned by e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF), has partnered with the Arbor Day Foundation. This alliance unites two organizations focused on environmental conservation and promoting mindful consumption. Well People, known for its high-performance clean cosmetics and skincare derived from plants, is at the forefront of the clean beauty industry. The collaboration aims to advance their mutual mission of planet restoration and encouraging conscious consumer choices.

data.title: Punchbowl® Launches Dr. Seuss Online Invitations & Digital Greeting Cards Inspired by Classic, Beloved Stories
data.description: Punchbowl®, a prominent online platform for invitations and greeting cards, has introduced a fresh assortment of designs produced in partnership with Dr. Seuss Enterprises, a renowned entertainment entity. The newly unveiled collection showcases beloved characters from popular tales such as The Cat in the Hat, Oh, the Places You’ll Go!, and The Lorax. With a focus on convenience, the offerings cater to time-strapped individuals, allowing for swift personalization of Dr. Seuss-themed designs for various occasions like birthdays, baby showers, and graduations. This collaboration aims to bring joy and nostalgia to users, offering a seamless way to create memorable event invitations featuring iconic characters.

data.title: Dine Brands Global, Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings On May 6, 2026
data.description: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN), the company behind Applebee's Neighborhood Grill + Bar®, IHOP®, and Fuzzy’s Taco Shop® eateries, is set to reveal its Q1 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026, prior to the market opening. Alongside this disclosure, Dine Brands will conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. (ET) on the same day to delve into the company’s financial performance and future prospects. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the call.

data.title: Toro Corp. Reports Net Income of $1.6 Million for the Three Months Ended December 31, 2025 and $5.9 Million for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus on April 15, 2026, Toro Corp. (NASDAQ: TORO), a worldwide energy transportation company, revealed its financial outcomes for the three months and the full year finishing on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Aurora to Host First Quarter 2026 Business Review Conference Call on May 6, 2026
data.description: Aurora Innovation, Inc. disclosed that it will unveil its first-quarter 2026 financial outcomes after the market closes on May 6, 2026. A business review conference call is scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time. The call will be streamed live on Aurora's investor relations site at ir.aurora.tech. Interested parties can access a replay of the webcast for 30 days post the call. Aurora (Nasdaq: AUR) focuses on providing the advantages of autonomous driving technology.

data.title: TEN to Deliver On-Site Trailer Inspections Through Ontario’s DriveON Pilot Program
data.description: A company called TEN, which specializes in leasing and maintenance services, has been chosen to take part in the DriveON Mobile Pilot Project in Ontario.
